lemon_market_new_listings.description: This vehicle is in fair condition. The exterior has visible scratches and small dents. The interior shows signs of significant wear. Mechanical systems are functional but may require maintenance soon.
This vehicle is in poor condition. The exterior and interior show significant wear and damage. Several mechanical and electrical systems are currently non-functional and require repair.

Looking for a project with potential? This vehicle has seen a lot of miles and definitely needs some significant TLC and mechanical attention to get back to its best. It's a great opportunity for a handy DIYer or someone looking for a budget-friendly fixer-upper at an unbeatable price!
The car is in good condition.

This vehicle is in fair condition. It remains a functional daily driver, but it does show significant signs of wear consistent with its age. The exterior has some noticeable scratches and a small dent on the rear passenger door, while the interior shows some staining on the seats and wear on the steering wheel. Mechanically, the car starts and runs, though the brakes will need servicing soon and the air conditioning is not blowing as cold as it used to. It is a dependable option for someone willing to put in a little maintenance work.

This vehicle is in fair condition, offering a reliable and functional driving experience for someone who values utility over a perfect aesthetic. The exterior shows several signs of age and use, including noticeable scratches on the passenger side doors and a few small dings on the rear bumper. The interior is generally well-kept but does show light staining on the upholstery and some minor wear on the driver's seat bolster. Mechanically, the car starts and runs reliably, though the front brake pads are nearing the end of their life and will need replacement soon. All essential features, including the air conditioning and power windows, are fully operational. This is an honest, dependable vehicle that serves well for daily commuting despite its cosmetic imperfections.

Presenting a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies consistent performance and structural integrity. This unit has undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection to ensure it meets our rigorous standards for mechanical reliability and aesthetic preservation. A premier selection for the discerning driver seeking a balance of proven durability and sophisticated styling.

Hey there! I'm parting ways with my trusty ride, and honestly, it’s been such a joy to drive. It’s in really solid shape and has plenty of life left for all your upcoming adventures! I’ve taken great care of it, and it runs like a dream. If you're looking for a reliable, comfy car that’s ready to hit the road today, this is the one for you. Come take it for a spin and see for yourself!

This 996-generation Carrera 2 is a driver-focused specimen featuring the iconic 3.4L naturally aspirated flat-six. The M96 power plant delivers linear torque through a precise 6-speed manual transaxle. Critical preventative maintenance is complete, including a dual-row IMS bearing retrofit and a fresh rear main seal. The chassis is enhanced with a Bilstein B12 Pro-Kit for improved damping and roll stiffness, while the braking system retains its original
Runs well. Clean interior. Minor exterior wear. Reliable transportation.

This meticulously maintained vehicle presents a wonderful opportunity for a driver seeking reliability and style. The exterior retains a deep, lustrous shine, accented by clean lines and only the most minor signs of careful use, such as faint stone chips expected of a well-loved car. Inside, the cabin is a pristine environment; the upholstery is free of tears, the dashboard is crack-free, and every electronic feature—from the dual-zone climate control to the premium audio system—functions exactly as intended. Mechanically, the car is in excellent health, benefiting from a rigorous service schedule that ensures a smooth, responsive ride and a quiet engine. With a comprehensive service history and tires showing deep tread, this car is truly turn-key and ready for its next chapter.

Presented for your consideration is a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. This unit has undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection to ensure it meets our rigorous standards for performance and safety. Offering a refined driving experience and a well-preserved interior, this vehicle represents an exceptional acquisition for the discerning motorist seeking reliability and sophisticated engineering.

Presenting a distinguished example of automotive engineering, this vehicle has been maintained to an exacting standard. It exhibits a commendable balance of mechanical precision and aesthetic preservation, ensuring a sophisticated driving experience. Rigorously inspected to verify its operational integrity, this offering represents a secure investment for those seeking a reliable, high-performance vehicle without compromise.

Hey there! I’m selling my trusty car and it’s looking for a brand new home! 🚗 It’s in really wonderful shape and has been super reliable for all my trips. It drives like a dream and has been well-loved, so you can just hop in and go. Perfect for your daily commute or weekend getaways. I'm so excited for the next person to enjoy it as much as I have!

This E46 M3 features the legendary S54 naturally aspirated 3.2L inline-six, delivering linear power through individual throttle bodies and a sharp 8,000 RPM redline. Power is managed via a Getrag 420G six-speed manual transmission and a variable M-differential lock for optimal mechanical traction. This example has undergone critical preventative maintenance, including a comprehensive VANOS overhaul and rod bearing replacement to ensure internal longevity. The chassis remains structurally sound with reinforced rear subframe mounts, while the suspension geometry maintains excellent kinematic integrity. Riding on staggered Style 67 alloys, this is a mechanically sorted, driver-focused machine ready for the tarmac.
Used vehicle. Good condition. Well maintained. Clean title. Reliable performance.

This vehicle has been meticulously maintained and serves as a reliable, stylish companion for any driver. The exterior boasts a deep, lustrous finish that has been regularly waxed, though it shows the minor, expected signs of careful road use. Inside, you'll find a smoke-free cabin with upholstery that remains firm and free of any significant wear or tears. All power features, including the ice-cold climate control and premium audio system, function exactly as intended. Mechanically, this car is sound; it has followed a strict preventative maintenance schedule with recent fluid services and a fresh set of tires with plenty of tread remaining. It starts up immediately, idles smoothly, and offers a confident, responsive driving experience on both city streets and highways. This is a turnkey example of a well-loved car ready for its next chapter.

Presenting a distinguished vehicle that exemplifies consistent maintenance and reliable performance. This well-preserved model offers a refined driving experience, featuring a clean interior and a robust mechanical history. An ideal selection for the discerning buyer seeking a balance of sophisticated engineering and long-term value.

Presenting a sophisticated blend of performance and reliability, this vehicle stands as a testament to diligent ownership and consistent maintenance. It has been thoroughly vetted to ensure it meets our exacting standards for mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. This represents a premier opportunity for the discerning driver to acquire a high-caliber automobile that offers a refined and confident driving experience.

Hey there! Are you looking for a reliable ride that’s been super well-loved? I’m selling my car and it’s in great shape! It’s been my trusty companion for a while now, and it still drives like a dream. It’s clean, dependable, and ready for its next adventure with you. You’re going to love how it handles on the road—it's perfect for daily commutes or weekend trips. Come take it for a spin and see for yourself!

This E46 M3 is a mechanically sorted example of the legendary S54-powered platform. The high-revving 3.2L inline-six features individual throttle bodies and delivers linear power through a tactile Getrag 420G 6-speed manual gearbox. Key preventative maintenance has been addressed, including a comprehensive VANOS overhaul and rod bearing replacement to ensure long-term reciprocating assembly health. The chassis has been enhanced with rear subframe reinforcement to mitigate common structural fatigue, while the variable M
Used car in good condition. Clean interior. Minimal exterior wear. Runs well. Regularly maintained.

This vehicle represents a fantastic balance of reliability and aesthetic appeal. The exterior retains a deep, lustrous finish with only minor road-wear consistent with its age. Inside, the cabin has been meticulously cared for, featuring supple seating surfaces and a fully functional suite of modern convenience features. Mechanically, the car is in solid working order, having benefited from a consistent maintenance schedule. The engine pulls smoothly, the transmission shifts seamlessly, and the suspension provides a comfortable, quiet ride. It comes with a complete service history, a clean title, and tires that have plenty of tread remaining. This is a dependable, well-presented car that is ready for its next owner to drive away with confidence.

Presenting an exceptional example of automotive engineering, this vehicle has been curated for the professional who demands both reliability and prestige. Maintaining a high standard of mechanical and aesthetic preservation, it serves as a testament to diligent ownership. Experience a seamless fusion of performance and sophistication at a competitive valuation.

We are pleased to present this impeccably maintained vehicle, which demonstrates a high standard of mechanical integrity and aesthetic preservation. Rigorously inspected by our certified technicians, this automobile offers a seamless blend of performance, reliability, and sophisticated design. Its well-appointed interior and robust powertrain represent a significant value proposition for the discerning motorist seeking a premium driving experience without compromise.

Hey there! Are you looking for a reliable ride that still looks great on the road? I’m parting with my trusty car, and it’s been such a joy to drive! It’s in solid shape, runs smoothly, and has been really well-loved over the years. It's perfect for daily commutes or fun weekend getaways. Come take it for a spin—I'm sure you’re gonna love it as much as I have!

This E46 M3 is a mechanically robust example featuring the high-revving S54B32 inline-six, renowned for its individual throttle bodies and 8,000 RPM redline. Power is delivered through a precise Getrag 420G six-speed manual transmission to a variable M differential lock. Critical preventative maintenance has been addressed, including a comprehensive VANOS overhaul and rear subframe reinforcement to ensure structural rigidity under lateral load. The suspension features refreshed bushings and upgraded dampers, maintaining the chassis's legendary communicative feedback. While showing minor cosmetic patina consistent with high-performance use, the drivetrain is synchronized perfectly, offering a visceral, analog driving experience that remains a benchmark in automotive engineering.
Good condition. Runs well. Clean interior. Maintenance records available. Title in hand.

This meticulously maintained vehicle strikes the perfect balance between luxury and performance. The exterior retains a deep, glossy luster, showing only the minor road wear expected of a car that has been enjoyed and consistently cared for. Inside, the cabin is a sanctuary of comfort; the premium upholstery remains supple, the dashboard is free of sun damage, and every electronic feature—from the dual-zone climate control to the high-fidelity sound system—functions exactly as intended. Mechanically, this car is in robust health, having undergone regular synthetic oil changes and recent preventative maintenance, including a fresh set of all-season tires and a comprehensive brake service. It drives straight, shifts smoothly, and offers a quiet, confident ride that reflects its history of responsible ownership. With a clean title and a detailed service log included, this is a turnkey opportunity for a buyer who values both long-term reliability and sophisticated style.

This vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer. Meticulously maintained and demonstrating consistent mechanical integrity, it offers a refined driving experience synonymous with the brand's heritage. Each component has been thoroughly vetted to ensure sustained performance and aesthetic appeal. An exceptional acquisition for those seeking an optimal balance of luxury and long-term value.
